name: 7q34_TRB_TCR_beta_locus
description: T-cell receptor beta (TRB) locus at 7q34. Contains ~65 TRBV segments (extensive paralogy, ~70-95% identity), two D-J-C cassettes (TRBD1-TRBJ1-TRBC1, TRBD2-TRBJ2-TRBC2). Somatic V(D)J recombination creates clone-specific deletions. Pseudogenes and orphons within the V cluster create the largest paralog family on chr7.

architecture.internal_structure: ~65 TRBV segments in tandem, two duplicated D-J-C cassettes (TRBC1, TRBC2 at >97% identity), TRBV-orphon paralogs distributed across genome (9p21, 7p14); largest contributor to TCR repertoire.

related_diseases: T-cell clonality testing for lymphoma diagnosis
